title: Phyllanthodendron dubium

Additionally, it is sometimes used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Further studies are necessary to fully understand the extent of its medicinal uses.
taxonomy: Phyllanthodendron dubium is a genus of flowering plants in the family Phyllanthaceae. It belongs to the order Malpighiales and the class Magnoliopsida. The phylum of Phyllanthodendron dubium is Magnoliophyta, which is a group of flowering plants. This plant's kingdom is Plantae, indicating its classification as a plant. Further classification is not readily available.
